response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in full-stack engineering, including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the role. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of GenAI-specific work (e.g., vector databases, RAG, multi-agent systems) or cloud platform expertise (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure). While his TypeScript and Python experience is strong, his AI/GenAI depth is unclear.
strengths: Proven full-stack engineering leadership with staff-level experience at Naver and Tencent
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Strong track record of building scalable systems and developer tooling
concerns: No explicit mention of GenAI-specific technologies (e.g., vector databases, RAG)
Limited evidence of cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure)
No clear experience with multi-agent systems or LLM optimization techniques
